page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software to systemically characterize phasiRNAs (Phase siRNAs)/tasiRNAs and their regulatory cascades ‘miRNA/phasiRNA  -> PHAS gene -> phasiRNAs -> target genes’ in plants.
